# Oxford Phonics World 自然拼读词形与单词总表

---

## Level 1 — The Alphabet（字母发音）

### Unit 1: Aa Bb Cc
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Aa | apple, ax, ant, alligator |
| Bb | bear, bird, bed, banana |
| Cc | cat, cup, car, computer |

### Unit 2: Dd Ee Ff
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Dd | dog, desk, doll, duck |
| Ee | egg, elbow, envelope, elephant |
| Ff | fish, fan, farm, fork |

### Unit 3: Gg Hh Ii
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Gg | gorilla, goat, gift, girl |
| Hh | horse, hat, house, hot dog |
| Ii | insect, ink, igloo, iguana |

### Unit 4: Jj Kk Ll
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Jj | jet, jam, juice, jacket |
| Kk | kangaroo, key, king, kite |
| Ll | lion, lamp, leaf, lemon |

### Unit 5: Mm Nn Oo
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Mm | monkey, milk, money, mouse |
| Nn | nut, net, nest, nose |
| Oo | octopus, ox, olive, ostrich |

### Unit 6: Pp Qq Rr
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Pp | peach, pen, panda, pineapple |
| Qq | queen, quiz, quilt, question |
| Rr | rabbit, rose, rice, robot |

### Unit 7: Ss Tt Uu Vv
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Ss | seal, sun, soap, socks |
| Tt | turtle, tent, tiger, teacher |
| Uu | umbrella, up, uncle, umpire |
| Vv | van, vet, vest, violin |

### Unit 8: Ww Xx Yy Zz
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| Ww | wolf, web, water, watch |
| Xx | fox, box, six, wax |
| Yy | yo-yo, yak, yogurt, yacht |
| Zz | zipper, zero, zoo, zebra |

---

## Level 2 — Short Vowels（短元音）

### Unit 1: short a — a, am, an
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| a | cat, ant, yak, ax |
| am | ram, jam, yam, dam |
| an | fan, man, pan, can |

### Unit 2: short a — ad, ag, ap, at
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ad, ag | dad, pad, bag, rag |
| ap | cap, map, nap, tap |
| at | bat, rat, hat, mat |

### Unit 3: short e — e, et, en, ed
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| e | web, egg, vet, ten |
| et | jet, net, wet, pet |
| en, ed | hen, pen, red, bed |

### Unit 4: short i — i, ip, ib, id
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| i | hip, ink, zip, in |
| ip | lip, tip, sip, rip |
| ib, id | bib, rib, kid, lid |

### Unit 5: short i — in, ig, it, ix
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| in | pin, fin, bin, win |
| ig | fig, wig, big, dig |
| it, ix | pit, hit, six, mix |

### Unit 6: short o — o, ot, op
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| o | fox, log, ox, rod |
| ot | pot, hot, cot, dot |
| op | top, mop, hop, pop |

### Unit 7: short u — u, ug, ud, up
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| u | sun, up, jug, hug |
| ug | bug, rug, mug |
| ud, up | bud, mud, pup, cup |

### Unit 8: short u — ut, ub, um, un
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ut | nut, hut, cut |
| ub, um | cub, tub, gum, hum |
| un | bun, run, fun |

---

## Level 3 — Long Vowels（长元音）

### Unit 1: long a — a_e, ame, ake, ate, ave
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| a_e | tape, cape, cane, mane |
| ame, ake | game, cake, name, lake |
| ate, ave | gate, wave, skate, cave |

### Unit 2: long i — i_e, ime, ike, ive, ine
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| i_e | kite, pine, ripe, fine |
| ime, ike | lime, bike, time, hike |
| ive, ine | five, nine, dive, line |

### Unit 3: long o / long u — o_e, u_e
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| o_e | home, bone, cone, rope |
| u_e | cube, mute, cute, mule |
| u_e | tube, June, tune, rule |

### Unit 4: long a — ai, ay
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ai | rain, nail, tail, wait |
| ay | bay, day, say, pay |
| ai, ay | sail, mail, hay, May |

### Unit 5: long e — ee, ea, y, ey
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ee | bee, feet, seed, jeep |
| ea | leaf, eat, sea, meat |
| y, ey | candy, key, happy, money |

### Unit 6: long i — igh, ie, y
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| igh | light, night, high, right |
| ie | pie, tie, lie, die |
| y | spy, sky, cry, my |

### Unit 7: long o — oa, ow
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| oa | boat, coat, soap, road |
| ow | bow, row, yellow, pillow |
| oa, ow | goat, toad, elbow, window |

### Unit 8: long u — ue, ui, ew, oo
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ue | blue, glue, clue, Tuesday |
| ui, ew | fruit, suit, new, dew |
| oo | moon, zoo, food, boot |

---

## Level 4 — Consonant Blends（辅音组合）

### Unit 1: bl, cl, br, cr, fl, gl
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| bl, cl | black, blanket, clock, club |
| br, cr | broom, bride, crab, crocodile |
| fl, gl | fly, flag, globe, glass |

### Unit 2: fr, gr, pl, sl, dr, tr
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| fr, gr | frog, Friday, green, grass |
| pl, sl | plate, play, slide, sleep |
| dr, tr | drum, dress, truck, tree |

### Unit 3: sm, sn, sp, sw, st
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| sm, sn | smile, smoke, snake, snow |
| sp, sw | spoon, spot, swing, swim |
| st | stop, test, stamp, fast |

### Unit 4: sh, ch, tch, ph, wh
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| sh | shell, fish, ship, brush |
| ch, tch | chick, lunch, watch, catch |
| ph, wh | phone, dolphin, whale, white |

### Unit 5: th (voiced/unvoiced), ck, qu
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| voiced th | this, that, mother, father |
| unvoiced th | three, teeth, think, bath |
| ck, qu | duck, rocket, queen, quilt |

### Unit 6: ng, nk, nd, nt, lt, mp
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ng, nk | king, long, bank, pink |
| nd, nt | wind, hand, tent, paint |
| lt, mp | belt, adult, lamp, camp |

### Unit 7: sk, sc, spr, str, spl, squ
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| sk, sc | skunk, desk, scale, school |
| spr, str | spray, spring, string, strong |
| spl, squ | splash, splint, squid, square |

### Unit 8: soft c, soft g, voiced s
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| soft c | rice, city, ice cream, cell phone |
| soft g | giraffe, orange, giant, cage |
| voiced s | rose, jeans, cheese, legs |

---

## Level 5 — Letter Combinations（字母组合）

### Unit 1: ar, ir, ur, er, or
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ar | car, farm, park, star |
| ir, ur | bird, girl, nurse, purple |
| er, or | teacher, sister, doctor, tractor |

### Unit 2: ou, ow, oi, oy, oo, u
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ou, ow | mouse, house, cow, brown |
| oi, oy | coin, soil, toy, boy |
| oo, u | book, foot, bush, pull |

### Unit 3: au, aw, all, wa, or, oar
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| au, aw | sauce, August, prawn, draw |
| all, wa | ball, tall, water, walk |
| or, oar | horse, fork, roar, board |

### Unit 4: are, air, ea, ear, ear, eer
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| are, air | square, share, chair, hair |
| ea, ear | bread, head, bear, pear |
| ear, eer | ear, clear, deer, cheer |

### Unit 5: a, e, i, o, u (open syllables)
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| a | acorn, baby, elevator, lady |
| e, i | he, she, tiger, child |
| o, u | cold, hotel, uniform, music |

### Unit 6: schwa — a, e, i, o, u, o
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| a | panda, gorilla, banana, umbrella |
| e, i, o, u | chicken, pencil, lemon, surprise |
| o | monkey, love, son, honey |

### Unit 7: silent letters — kn, wr, mb, ve, rh, st
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| kn, wr | knife, knee, write, wrong |
| mb, ve | lamb, comb, glove, live |
| rh, st | rhino, rhubarb, whistle, castle |

### Unit 8: ture, sure, tion, sion, ous, ful
| 词形 | 对应单词 |
|------|----------|
| ture, sure | picture, nature, treasure, measure |
| tion, sion | station, competition, television, excursion |
| ous, ful | famous, dangerous, beautiful, helpful |
